name: Simple Figures SOM
description: SOM with simple synthetic patterns (halves, bars, dots). Configurable sharpening and learning. Progressive difficulty to validate the system before attempting ASCII.

config.description: Synthetic binary patterns for SOM validation. Change input.text to try different patterns: HALF_TOP,HALF_BOT (easiest), BARS_H,BARS_V (orientation), DOT_TL,DOT_BR (sparse). Adjust tension_function and learning rate to find convergence.
